labels.analysis: The MCP Server "xProof" provides 6 tools focused on security & authentication tasks. Core capabilities include creation and generation. Key tools: certify_file, verify_proof, get_proof, discover_services, audit_agent_session.
labels.reasoning: Primary label "Security & Authentication" assigned based on strong keyword matches in tool names and descriptions: security, compliance, audit, certificate.

tools.name: certify_file
tools.description: Create a blockchain certification for a file. Records the SHA-256 hash on MultiversX blockchain as immutable proof of existence and ownership. Cost: $0.05 per certification, paid in EGLD.

file_hash.description: SHA-256 hash of the file (64 hex characters)

author_name.description: Name of the certifier (default: AI Agent)

webhook_url.description: Optional HTTPS URL for on-chain confirmation callback

tools.name: verify_proof
tools.description: Verify an existing xproof certification. Returns proof details including file hash, timestamp, blockchain transaction, and verification status.

proof_id.description: UUID of the certification to verify

tools.name: get_proof
tools.description: Retrieve a proof in structured JSON or Markdown format. Use JSON for machine processing, Markdown for LLM consumption.

tools.name: discover_services
tools.description: Discover available xproof certification services, pricing, and capabilities. No authentication required.

tools.name: audit_agent_session
tools.description: Certify an AI agent's work session on the MultiversX blockchain BEFORE executing any critical action (trade, deploy, data access). Returns a proof_id compliance certificate. The agent MUST call this tool before acting — certification failure blocks execution. Schema: https://xproof.app/.well-known/agent-audit-schema.json

agent_id.description: Identifier of the agent making the decision

action_type.description: Category of the action being certified

action_description.description: Human-readable description of the specific action

inputs_hash.description: SHA-256 of all inputs analyzed before making the decision

risk_level.description: Assessed risk level of the action

decision.description: Agent's decision about whether to proceed

timestamp.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of when the decision was made

risk_summary.description: Optional brief risk analysis justifying the decision

context.description: Optional additional context (model version, environment, tool chain, etc.)

tools.name: check_attestations
tools.description: Check domain-specific attestations for an AI agent wallet on xproof. Returns active attestations issued by third-party certifying bodies (healthcare, finance, legal, security, research). Each active attestation adds +50 to the agent's trust score (max +150 from 3 attestations). Use this to verify an agent's credentials before delegating a sensitive task.

wallet.description: MultiversX wallet address (erd1...) of the agent to check
